queries.name: Agent planning and tool use
queries.search_query: cat:cs.AI AND (all:agent OR all:agentic) AND (all:planning OR all:tool-use OR all:tool)

queries.name: Agent evaluation and reliability
queries.search_query: (cat:cs.AI OR cat:cs.CL) AND (all:agent OR all:agentic) AND (all:evaluation OR all:benchmark OR all:reliability)

queries.name: Coding agents
queries.search_query: cat:cs.SE AND (all:agent OR all:agentic OR all:LLM) AND (all:software OR all:coding)

queries.name: Agent safety and human collaboration
queries.search_query: (cat:cs.AI OR cat:cs.HC OR cat:cs.CR) AND (all:agent OR all:agentic) AND (all:safety OR all:security OR all:human)
